candidate_sentence: In the high-inventory localized-release case, the maximum debris front reached $x/L=0.9946$ by 10.00 ms, whereas the population remained localized with $x_{99}/L=0.4202$ and a source-retention fraction of 0.8945. Only 14 particles lay beyond $x/L=0.80$ and 2 particles lay beyond $x/L=0.95$; 0 particles crossed the outlet plane. The late maximum-front slope became negative (-5.26% of its early positive value), indicating near-outlet front slowdown/saturation rather than breakthrough.
safe_claims: absence of outlet crossing up to the current returned frame
